pages.text: Nick sits calmly in the dental chair.
pages.imagePrompt: Nick sits calmly in the dental chair at the beginning of his appointment.

pages.text: The friendly dentist gently counts Nick's teeth.
pages.imagePrompt: A friendly dentist gently counts Nick's teeth during a calm checkup.

pages.text: Nick feels proud and goes home.
pages.imagePrompt: Nick leaves the dental clinic smiling proudly and giving a relaxed thumbs-up.
